name: The Dragon Upstairs
tagline: A tiny Chinatown jazz club above a bar — 30-person room where you're practically sitting with the band.
talkStory: A tiny jazz club above a Chinatown bar that features some of Hawaii's best jazz musicians in an intimate setting. The room holds maybe 30 people, creating a close-knit atmosphere where you're almost sitting with the band. Locals who love live music consider this one of Honolulu's greatest treasures. No cover on some nights; check the schedule online. Arrive early for a good seat.
